headline: Airbnb upgraded by Truist on stronger 2026 outlook
summary: Investing.com -- Truist upgraded Airbnb to Hold from Sell in a note to clients on Thursday following 4Q25 earnings in the lodging and leisure sector, citing resilient travel demand and improved earnings projections.

headline: Wall Street Turns Less Bearish on Airbnb: Truist Raises Target to $129
summary: Truist upgraded Airbnb (NASDAQ:ABNB) to Hold from Sell on Thursday, raising its price target to $129 from $107, after revising its 2026 adjusted EBITDA and earnings estimates higher. The move is part of a broader sector reassessment following Q4 reports across the lodging and leisure space. With Airbnb shares trading at $133.88 on Thursday morning ... Wall Street Turns Less Bearish on Airbnb: Truist Raises Target to $129
